HGSS.764.0034:
[0300,0000,0000]\f
Flick Berries into the mouth of a
rotating SWALOT.\f
Score bonus points for getting Berries
in consecutively.\f
Score even more during Fever Time.\f
Take deliberate aim or fire randomly--
the choice is yours!\f
HGSS.764.0035:
[0300,0000,0000]\f
Roll a ball while keeping a MIME JR.
balanced on top.\f
If the MIME JR. manages to stay on,
lights flash and the applause begins.\f
If everyone manages to keep going,
the curtains will rise.\f
Try to keep your MIME JR. balanced
and on the ball!\f
HGSS.764.0036:
[0300,0000,0000]\f
Press down on the pump from
directly above to pump maximum\r
air into a balloon until it pops.\f
Pop balloons until time runs out.\f
Pressing the pump hard will make it
turn red, increasing its capacity.\f
The circling WYNAUT can also help.\f
Line a WYNAUT up with the pump to
boost the air volume, but beware:\f
lining up the pump with a skinny
WYNAUT reduces the air volume.\f
